question: Look up the Soroswap project entry — what's its website and category?

golden.answer: The live Lumenloop directory record, checked **2026-07-10**, resolves to **Soroswap** with website **https://soroswap.finance/** and category **Financial Protocols**. PaltaLabs may be returned as a source-scoped parent/operator field. Keep this lookup to the requested identity, website, and Lumenloop category; Scout uses a different taxonomy, and status/funding belong to separate current records.
keyFacts: Resolves the correct Soroswap entity, website, and Lumenloop category Financial Protocols.
avoid: Do NOT substitute Scout's Protocol/Contract taxonomy for the Lumenloop field.
Do NOT expand this directory lookup into a capabilities, routing, or funding essay.
golden.notes:
GROUNDED 2026-06-22 (re-verified 2026-06-29): Scout directory record — Soroswap, category Protocol/Contract (type DEX), status Live, website https://soroswap.finance/, github https://github.com/soroswap, twitter @soroswapfinance, SCF $346,750. This is the STRICT directory field-lookup lane → lumenloop_search_directory — DISTINCT from q-defi-soroswap-what-is (lumenloop_get_project; identity + what-makes-it-different routing essay). Added must_avoid against turning the resolve into a capabilities explainer.
Also good if the answer: Correctly resolves the name 'Soroswap' to the right project (not a confusable like StellarX).
Golden cites: The directory entry source.
GT-18 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: for this Lumenloop-targeted lane, Financial Protocols is the source field. Do not require Scout status/type/funding fields.

corroboration.claim: Lumenloop resolves Soroswap to soroswap.finance under Financial Protocols.
